quality_notes: Add vulnerability: mention a mistake, failure, or lesson learned. Try 'I was wrong', 'took me years to learn', or 'finally understood'.
Avoid repeating the phrase 'in production' multiple times.
Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.

post_text:
📌 Detecting AI Written Code

AI-generated code is already a bigger problem in production environments than most engineers admit.

1️⃣ Code submissions need human review

2️⃣ AI detection methods are limited
The current state of AI detection methods relies heavily on pattern recognition and machine learning algorithms, which can be easily tricked by sophisticated AI-generated code.

Code Submission -> Human Review | AI Detection -> Flagged Code

3️⃣ Best practices include code reviews
Production systems that effectively prevent AI-generated code prioritize human review and manual inspection of code submissions, rather than relying solely on automated detection methods 🚫.

4️⃣ Common mistakes include over-reliance on
Most engineers get wrong the assumption that AI detection methods are foolproof, when in reality, they are only a supplement to human review and oversight 🤖.

The one thing to remember is that human review and oversight are essential to preventing AI-generated code in production environments, and should not be replaced by automated methods 📝.

💬 What's the most effective way to prevent AI-generated code:

#AIGeneratedCode #CodeReview #HumanOversight #ProductionEnvironments #SoftwareEngineering #CodeSecurity 🔒💻🔍

  @keyframes fd{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(7px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
  @keyframes si{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.62)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}}
  @keyframes sl{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}}
  @keyframes fr{0%{stroke-dashoffset:24}100%{stroke-dashoffset:0}}
  @keyframes pu{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.50}}
  @keyframes gw{0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 3px currentColor)}50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px currentColor)}}
  .fi{animation:fd .48s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both}
  .si{animation:si .38s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both}
  .sl{animation:sl .42s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both}
  .flow{stroke-dasharray:8 4;animation:fr 1.4s linear infinite}
  .pu{animation:pu 2.2s ease-in-out infinite}
  .gw{animation:gw 2.8s ease-in-out infinite}
